title: selaginella sandvicensis
intro: Selaginella sandvicensis, also known as Hawaiian pepper plant, is a species of spore-producing plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly found in Hawaii and other tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate pain, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Selaginella sandvicensis include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
